[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00010001 2
2 00000001 1
3 10000000 1
4 11001100 4
5 11000100 3
6 01000000 1
7 00100010 2
